accordion.paymentBody:
For high-value payments, the card issuer may call to verify your purchase.

If the verification process indicates a stolen card or unauthorized order, the order may be held or cancelled.

For bank transfer payments, you can transfer the product cost via PC banking, internet banking, phone banking, or in person at the nearest bank.

The depositor name entered at order must match the actual depositor; payment must be made within 7 days, otherwise the order will be automatically cancelled.
accordion.shippingNote1: Average delivery takes 1-2 days; please note delays may occur depending on the carrier.
accordion.shippingNote2: Jeju / remote island areas may take a bit longer.
accordion.shippingNote3: Jeju / remote island areas may require additional fees.
accordion.shippingNote4: Your order will be shipped after payment is confirmed.
accordion.shippingNote5: Note that some products may experience slight shipping delays.
accordion.returnable1: - Within 7 days after receiving the product
accordion.returnable2: - However, electronics that have been opened or had packaging damaged in a way that loses product value cannot be exchanged/returned.
accordion.returnable3: - If the delivered product/service differs from what was advertised, within 3 months of delivery or within 30 days of becoming aware
accordion.notReturnable1: - When the product is lost or damaged due to the customer's responsibility (except where packaging was opened to confirm contents)
accordion.notReturnable2: - When packaging was opened or damaged in a way that loses product value (e.g., electronics, food, music; defective pixels on laptops/LCD monitors/digital cameras follow the manufacturer's policy)
accordion.notReturnable3: - When the product value is significantly reduced by the customer's use or partial consumption (cosmetics: only when a trial product was provided)
accordion.notReturnable4: - When the product value is significantly reduced over time, making resale difficult
accordion.notReturnable5: - When packaging of copyable products is damaged (for details, please use customer service 1:1 email)
accordion.exchangeNotice:
※ If you change your mind and request exchange/return, the return shipping cost is the customer's responsibility.
(Includes color/size exchanges)
